matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 001000110 3
2 001001101 4
3 001001111 5
4 100100010 3
5 011110011 6

7 000110110 4

50 05 000110110 4 match 7
61 16 011011101 6
